message:
fix(ci): use macos-13 for x86_64 macOS builds

macos-latest is now arm64, so use macos-13 (x86_64) for x86_64
builds to get the correct homebrew library paths.

files.patch:
@@ -14,7 +14,7 @@ jobs:
             arch: aarch64
             target: aarch64-macos
             name: termweb-macos-aarch64
-          - os: macos-latest
+          - os: macos-13
             arch: x86_64
             target: x86_64-macos
             name: termweb-macos-x86_64
